Buy for $81 (Reg. $100)

What we love

Well, this handy BougeRV camping light is a versatile device that you should definitely consider adding to your kit, as its 15,600mAh battery allows for up to 102 hours of lighting on each full charge. items.title: Score Whisker’s Litter-Robot 3 Connect with a loaded up core bundle at its $599 2026 low, more
items.summary: By way of its official Amazon storefront, Whisker is offering the Litter-Robot 3 Connect Core Bundle down at $599 shipped, which you can’t find directly from the brand’s website anymore. Normally $699 at full price, we’ve only seen three previous discounts to $649 and $599 in 2026, with it back again for you today. While the deal lasts, you’re getting a $100 markdown to the lowest price we have tracked this year. The bundle contains the Litter-Robot, a LitterTrap mat, a fence, a ramp, 25 waste bin liners, three carbon filters, and a 1-year warranty. You can also find the Litter-Robot 3 Connect for $499 shipped (with a hands-on review available to get in-depth info), or you can find the brand’s newer model deals on the direct website here.

It dropped down from its $879 full price to $779 in mid-May and held there for most of the time since, with a short-lived drop to the former $699 low at the top of June. Now though, you can get it with a larger-than-ever $200 markdown off the tag, landing things at a new all-time low price. There’s also the more compact 2,100 PSI model with or without batteries starting from $299 shipped, as well as some additional deals to browse in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.summary: Alienware is celebrating 30 years of gaming hardware with a fresh trio of new gaming monitors, and these new models are now up for grabs for your battlestation. The new range includes the flagship 34-inch AW3426DW QD-OLED model at $799.99 shipped, along with two more affordable 240Hz options – the 34-inch AW3426DWM at $399.99 shipped and the 32-inch AW3226DM at $299.99 shipped. The brand is essentially bringing its premium ultrawide and high-refresh gaming experience to a wider price range with these new displays, so you don’t necessarily have to jump all the way to a flagship monitor to get a serious upgrade.

items.title: Load up on discounted $10 Nintendo gift cards at Amazon to score rare deals on the eShop

What we love

To me, lighting like this can quickly enhance the look of a space and make it look much more high end. It also improves visiblity when cooking, cleaning, or whatever else needs to be done in the kitchen.

What we love

I personally use cord cover like this to get Ethernet, HDMI, and other types of cables where they need to go without leaving much of a trace. This particular style can hold 3-4 cords and spans roughly 12 feet in length.
